prompt: Update the prism docs site from the latest PRISM-DOCUMENTATION file
expected_output: Skill identifies the latest PRISM-DOCUMENTATION-*.md file, reads the section mapping, compares sections against VitePress pages, presents a change summary, and waits for approval before modifying any files
expectations: Section mapping reference is read before any analysis
A change summary is presented listing new, updated, and removed sections
User approval is requested before any file modifications
VitePress frontmatter is preserved in all updated pages
